# CWE-916 safe: bcrypt password hashing
lang: go
file: CWE-916-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-916 mitigated: bcrypt provides adaptive work factor for password storage.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Password string
}

func RegisterStrongHash(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		username := c.PostForm("username")
		password := c.PostForm("password")
		hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		rec := Account{Username: username, Password: string(hash)}
		if err := db.Create(&rec).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": rec.ID})
	}
}
